name: Andre Escalation Ladder — 7-day NEPQ cadence
description: Andre Raw's own escalation ladder, faithfully transcribed. Fires when a Close lead lands with Andre as owner (or should be reassigned to him). Runs lead enrichment, enrolls the lead in a seven-day NEPQ-style probe cadence through Close sequences, creates Close call-tasks on silence (the Day-1 double-tap), branches on the Day-3 phone-call ask (YES -> dated Andre task; NO / silence -> loop Days 4-7), and handles the parallel 'tasting booked -> agent must set expectations' scenario. Semi-auto is okay; realign is a must, no matter what.

batch_policy.notes: Small batches. One cohort at a time so Andre can eyeball each wave before the next enrolls.

principles: SEMI AUTO is okay but REALIGN IS A MUST NO MATTER WHAT.
The majority of this is Close automation but needs to be monitored by Andre so Andre can use his discretion if it makes sense to push on his own outside the Close automation.
Credit flows outward — when a deal closes off this cadence, the audit names Andre; the workflow never inserts itself.

nodes.label: Close: lead owner changed
nodes.notes: Fires whenever a Close lead's owner field mutates. This is the entry point — not a Slack trigger, Close is primary.
nodes.description: A lead in Close gets a new owner. That's the first heartbeat of the ladder.

nodes.label: Close: tasting booked
nodes.notes: Parallel trigger — if the lead graduates to 'tasting booked' mid-cadence, jump straight to the agent-handoff task.
nodes.description: The lead said yes to a tasting. That means Andre must speak to them directly to set expectations.

nodes.label: Run on demand
nodes.notes: Admin-initiated run from the UI for a single lead (e.g., re-kicking a lead that fell out of the cadence).
nodes.description: A human says 'run the ladder on this lead' — used for one-off nudges, not the default path.

nodes.label: Andre identity
nodes.notes: people/andre_raw.json — voice, handling, affinity anchors. Read-only reference.
nodes.description: Andre's identity record. Voice, cadence, affinity — the source of truth for how this ladder sounds.

nodes.label: NEPQ playbook
nodes.notes: The NEPQ-style probe structure, cadence spacing, and the Avoid-This rules.
nodes.description: The sales playbook — NEPQ probes, 5-day cadence rule, avoid-abandoning rule.

nodes.label: Activity ledger
nodes.notes: Append-only audit trail. Every mutation on Close by this workflow writes one line here.
nodes.description: Every move this ladder makes leaves a trace in the append-only activity ledger.

nodes.label: Close: reassign to Andre

config.rule: if lead matches Andre affinity (Brazilian church / wedding / Portuguese-speaker / high-value) and current_owner != andre, set owner = andre. Annotate lead note: 'Reassigned to Andre — THIS IS OUR LEAD NOW.'

nodes.notes: 'Changes lead owner for Andre — THIS IS OUR LEAD NOW.' Affinity heuristics from projects/lead_rotation.json.
nodes.description: If the lead fits Andre's shape and isn't his yet, reassign. Never silent — always annotated on the lead.

nodes.label: ONLY WORK IF ANDRE
nodes.notes: Hard gate. If, after the reassign attempt, the owner still isn't Andre, the workflow abstains with a ledger line. No silent touches on another rep's lead.
nodes.description: The gate. Only work if it's Andre. Any other owner — abstain, log, step back.

nodes.label: Lead enrichment
nodes.notes: Rodbot reads the lead + playbook + source data and produces the enrichment payload that seeds the Day-1 probe.
nodes.description: Rodbot reads the lead and the playbook, then produces the enrichment payload that shapes the first probe.

nodes.label: Day 1: enroll in sequence
nodes.notes: Close's native sequence owns the actual send. First NEPQ probe message setting up a meeting for a phonecall.
nodes.description: Day 1 fires. Close sends the first NEPQ-style probe asking to set up a phone call.

nodes.label: Day 1: response?
nodes.notes: We know the machine sends the AUTOMATED message but if we don't see a response we try a double tap (2 phonecalls).
nodes.description: 24 hours after Day 1 send — any inbound? If yes, move to Day 2. If silence, double-tap.

nodes.label: Day 1: 2 phonecall tasks
nodes.notes: Two Close phone-call tasks assigned to Andre, spaced four hours apart. Andre owns the actual dial.
nodes.description: Silence on Day 1 — two phonecall tasks drop on Andre's queue so he can double-tap.

nodes.label: Day 2: tasting info
nodes.notes: Same NEPQ structure, different hook — talk about the NEXT tasting and attach tasting info.
nodes.description: Day 2. Same NEPQ structure, new hook — Comeketo's next tasting, with the info attached.

nodes.label: Day 3: phonecall ask

config.human_discretion_note: Andre may push on his own outside the Close automation if it makes sense.

nodes.notes: Day 3 is the phonecall ask. Majority Close automation but monitored — Andre can push on his own.
nodes.description: Day 3. We ask for a phonecall directly. Andre watches and may push on his own if it makes sense.

nodes.label: Classify response
nodes.notes: Rodbot parses the reply and extracts either a proposed date/time or a classification. If silent >24h, treat as SILENCE.
nodes.description: Rodbot reads the reply and decides: YES with a date, YES vague, NO, or silence.

nodes.label: YES: dated Andre task
nodes.notes: IF YES — put this into Andre's Close task queue as a dated reminder to call this person on the date set by the answer.
nodes.description: Lead said yes. A dated Close task lands on Andre with a reminder to call on the day they named.

nodes.label: NO / silence: loop Day 4-7
nodes.notes: If NO — REPEAT DAY 3 through 7 for ANY KIND OF RESPONSE. Stop the moment the lead replies or books.
nodes.description: Silence or no — loop Days 4 through 7 until any response lands or the lead books a tasting.

nodes.label: Tasting booked: handoff task

config.notes_template: Lead booked a tasting. Call to confirm what's the best time for Andre to call about the reservation they made.

nodes.notes: 2nd scenario — they say YES to a tasting. Means they need to speak to agent to set expectations.
nodes.description: Tasting booked triggers a high-priority Andre task: call to set expectations on the reservation.

nodes.label: REALIGN IS A MUST

config.require: lead.owner == andre AND lead.tasks.any(assignee == andre, due_within=48h)

nodes.notes: Semi-auto is okay but REALIGN IS A MUST NO MATTER WHAT. Every terminal branch of this ladder passes through this gate before the audit.
nodes.description: The must-realign gate. Before the audit closes a pass, the lead must be owned by Andre with an active task.

nodes.label: Emit audit report
nodes.notes: Per-run audit report. Rolls up every mutation made against Close by this workflow since the last audit.
nodes.description: Rodbot compiles the audit — enrollments, double-taps, YES tasks, realign failures. One report per run.

nodes.label: reports/andre_escalation
nodes.notes: Daily audit lands as a markdown file under reports/andre_escalation/. Indexed under indexes/index.json.reports.
nodes.description: The audit writes to reports/andre_escalation/<date>.md — the human-readable artifact of the day's cadence.

nodes.label: Mission-control cell
nodes.notes: Live cell on the mission-control grid so the admin can see cadence health at a glance.
nodes.description: A live cell on the mission-control grid — Andre's cadence health in one tile.

connections.label: fires
connections.description: Any Close lead owner change wakes the workflow and checks reassignment.

connections.label: post-state
connections.description: After the reassign attempt, check whether the owner is now Andre.

connections.label: owner=andre
connections.description: Gate passes — enrichment begins. Gate fails — abstain.

connections.label: identity
connections.description: Rodbot reads Andre's identity to match voice and affinity during enrichment.

connections.label: NEPQ
connections.description: The sales playbook provides the NEPQ probe structures and cadence rules.

connections.label: on demand
connections.description: Manual UI trigger bypasses the Close webhook and kicks enrichment directly.

connections.label: enrollment
connections.description: The enriched lead enrolls into Close's 7-day NEPQ sequence. Day 1 fires.

connections.label: 24h watch
connections.description: 24-hour watch window after the Day 1 send. Did the lead respond?

connections.label: no response
connections.description: Silence triggers the double-tap — two phonecall tasks on Andre.

connections.label: next day
connections.description: Whether the double-tap reaches them or not, Day 2 still fires on schedule.

connections.label: response
connections.description: Response received on Day 1 — move to Day 2's tasting message.

connections.label: advance
connections.description: Day 2 completes — advance to the Day 3 phonecall ask.

connections.label: classify
connections.description: The Day 3 reply (or silence) flows into Rodbot's classifier.

connections.label: YES
connections.description: YES branch — create the dated Andre task.

connections.label: NO / silence
connections.description: NO or silence — enter the Day 4-7 loop.

connections.label: repeat
connections.description: Each loop day re-fires the phonecall ask via Close sequence until any response lands.

connections.label: tasting
connections.description: Parallel trigger — a booked tasting immediately creates the agent-handoff task.

connections.label: must realign
connections.description: YES task passes through the must-realign gate before the audit.

connections.label: must realign
connections.description: Tasting handoff task also passes through the must-realign gate.

connections.label: must realign
connections.description: Every loop iteration also confirms realign before logging the audit.

connections.label: audit
connections.description: Clean realign passes through to the audit actor.

connections.label: report
connections.description: The audit writes the markdown file under reports/andre_escalation/.

connections.label: append
connections.description: The audit appends one activity-ledger line per mutation and one summary line.

connections.label: tile
connections.description: The audit updates the mission-control cell with current cadence health.

metadata.source: Andre's escalation-ladder whiteboard, transcribed 2026-04-23. Three ClickUp-style photos attached to the cowork session.
